title: 30pc 10 inch Balloons Plain Black Chrome Gold Latex Balloons Mix Pack For Birthday Wedding Baby Shower Party Decoration Supplies
features: 10" Party Balloons 30pc : This Balloon Pack contains 30pc Latex Balloons of 10 Inches. You will receive MIx Pack of 10inch plain black + chrome gold Ballons. Sufficient quantity to decorate your party and amaze your guests

Make Your Party Special: If you are looking for a fun and fresh way to “WOW” your guests this Christmas this fantastic combination of balloon will make any Occasion special. Create balloon clusters garlands traditional centrepieces table runners or ballon drops these vibrant balloon set will take you one step further to create the spark at your parties

Safe Latex Material: These balloons made of Made of high quality thick recyclable latex material that makes them more durable not easy to burst. These balloons can be filled with air or helium. Balloons filled with air usually hold their size and shape much longer, sometimes for up to a week. Care Tips: Before inflating the balloons stretch them so that they won't deform afterwards. Pump Inflation is recommended. Don’t over fill the balloon and avoid heat to prevent them from popping. Children under age 8 use them under adult supervision. If you have any questions please contact us
description: Make your celebration awesomely fun with these balloons. Made from helium- Latex material, these balloons offer a ton of fun to kids and are a staple for celebrating any occasion. These balloons come in a wide variety of vibrant & cheerful colours. These colour popping effect when used for decorating events such as birthday, anniversary, and other celebrations. These novelty balloons are delivered flat packed. You can inflate them with air as well as helium gas manually or with a pump. Once inflated, these balloons make for hours of fun for kids to play with
